# Phase C body-hash drift allowlist (p175).
#
# Each entry is "name@normalized_args" for a function whose live body
# (md5 of whitespace-normalized prosrc) does NOT match the latest
# CREATE FUNCTION capture in supabase/migrations/.
#
# Baseline generated by scripts/generate-rpc-drift-baseline.mjs at p175
# bootstrap. Ratchet DOWN by capturing bodies via apply_migration (Phase
# B drift recovery) and re-running this script to regenerate.
#
# Test enforces:
#   1. No NEW drift outside this allowlist.
#   2. Allowlist stays in sync — entries that are now clean (or extinct)
#      must be removed AND the baseline constant in
#      tests/contracts/rpc-migration-coverage.test.mjs decremented.
#   3. Size matches the constant in the test file.
#
# See docs/audit/RPC_BODY_DRIFT_AUDIT_P50.md § Phase C charter.

_audit_list_public_tables@
_audit_preview_gate_eligibles_drift@
_auto_stage_alumni_on_cycle_open@
_block_self_evaluation@
_enqueue_engagement_welcome@p_engagement_id uuid
_get_peer_review_eligibility@p_application_id uuid
_get_vault_secret@p_name text
_grant_auto_xp@p_slug text, p_recipient_id uuid, p_ref_id uuid, p_reason text
_log_gate_attempt@p_application_id uuid, p_rpc_name text, p_caller_id uuid, p_gate_passed boolean, p_gate_failed_code text, p_gate_failed_reason text, p_bypass_requested boolean, p_bypass_granted boolean, p_payload jsonb, p_organization_id uuid
_offboarding_create_stub@
_sync_interview_to_event@p_interview_id uuid
_sync_member_initiative_from_engagement@
_trg_compute_evaluation_anomalies_on_phase_change@
_trg_engagement_welcome_notify@
_trg_refresh_preview_gate_eligibles_on_engagement@
_trg_sync_interview_to_event@
_tribe_broadcast_urgent_rate_limit@
_validate_gates_shape@p_gates jsonb
record_ai_validation@p_application_id uuid, p_ai_purpose text, p_validation_action text, p_ai_score numeric, p_ai_verdict text, p_ai_model text, p_override_score numeric, p_comment text
record_member_activity@p_page text
record_offboarding_interview@p_member_id uuid, p_exit_interview_full_text text, p_exit_interview_source text, p_return_interest boolean, p_return_window_suggestion text, p_lessons_learned text, p_recommendation_for_future text, p_referred_by_tribe_leader boolean, p_attachment_urls text[], p_reason_category_code text
register_card_drive_file@p_board_item_id uuid, p_drive_file_id text, p_drive_file_url text, p_filename text, p_mime_type text, p_size_bytes bigint, p_uploaded_via text
register_decision@p_event_id uuid, p_title text, p_description text, p_related_card_ids uuid[]
request_to_join_initiative@p_initiative_id uuid, p_message text
resolve_action_item@p_action_item_id uuid, p_resolution_note text, p_carry_to_event_id uuid
respond_re_engagement@p_pipeline_id uuid, p_response text, p_note text
respond_to_initiative_invitation@p_invitation_id uuid, p_response text, p_note text
review_change_request@p_cr_id uuid, p_action text, p_notes text
review_initiative_request@p_invitation_id uuid, p_decision text, p_note text
revoke_consent_via_token@p_token text, p_consent_type text
rls_can_for_initiative@p_action text, p_initiative_id uuid
seed_member_engagement_by_role@p_person_id uuid, p_template_slug text, p_initiative_id uuid
seed_pre_onboarding_steps@p_application_id uuid, p_member_id uuid
set_my_gamification_visibility@p_opt_out boolean
set_my_muted_notification_types@p_muted_types text[]
stage_alumni_for_re_engagement@p_member_id uuid, p_cycle_code text, p_source text
submit_evaluation@p_application_id uuid, p_evaluation_type text, p_scores jsonb, p_notes text, p_criterion_notes jsonb, p_ai_suggestion_id uuid
sync_initiative_from_tribe@
sync_member_status_consistency@
sync_tribe_from_initiative@
trg_approval_signoff_immutable@
trg_approval_signoff_notify_fn@
trg_artia_sync_govdoc_ratified@
trg_document_comment_enforce_edit_window@
trg_document_version_audit@
trg_sync_current_version_on_publish@
unlink_partner_from_card@p_partner_entity_id uuid, p_board_item_id uuid
update_card_comment@p_comment_id uuid, p_new_body text
update_card_during_meeting@p_card_id uuid, p_event_id uuid, p_new_status text, p_fields jsonb, p_note text
update_checklist_item@p_checklist_item_id uuid, p_text text, p_position smallint, p_target_date date
update_future_events_in_group@p_event_id uuid, p_new_time_start time without time zone, p_duration_minutes integer, p_meeting_link text, p_notes text, p_visibility text, p_type text, p_nature text
update_initiative@p_initiative_id uuid, p_title text, p_description text, p_status text, p_metadata jsonb
update_my_application@p_fields jsonb
update_notification_preferences@p_prefs jsonb
update_organization@p_name text, p_description text, p_website_url text, p_logo_url text, p_host_chapter text, p_primary_language text, p_country text, p_federated_chapters text[]
update_pmi_onboarding_step@p_token text, p_step_key text, p_status text, p_evidence_url text

v4_expire_engagements_shadow@
validate_initiative_metadata@p_kind text, p_metadata jsonb

verify_certificate@p_code text
